description: A designed graphic with a black-and-white photo of two men in dark suits seated at a table with microphones and the presidential seal; the man at right gestures while speaking. A white box below carries a Fox News channel logo and a headline 'ICE arrests relatives of slain Iranian general Soleimani living in US after Rubio revokes their green cards'. A 'U.S. Department of State' wordmark is at the bottom.
notable_text: FOX NEWS channel; ICE arrests relatives of slain Iranian general Soleimani living in US after Rubio revokes their green cards; U.S. DEPARTMENT of STATE
